name: Oatmeal Cookie/Florida
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Beat the margarine and sugars together until fluffy.
3. Add the egg or egg beaters and vanilla, mixing well.
4. Stir in the combined flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Fold in the oats.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8 to 9 minutes for a chewy cookie, or 10 to 11 minutes for a crisp cookie.
8. Turn off the oven heat when finished baking.
